text: A healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well and staying active. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, provides the energy your body needs. Regular exercise, like walking or cycling for at least 30 minutes a day, strengthens your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep—around seven to nine hours each night—to help your body recover and your mind focus. Mental health matters too; taking time to relax or talk about your feelings can reduce stress. Finally, maintaining a healthy work-life balance ensures you have time for hobbies and loved ones, which supports overall well-being.
